evidence_summary: Official Alnylam SEC filings are explicit that on July 31, 2003, Alnylam acquired all outstanding voting shares of Ribopharma AG for cash, stock, and assumed debt. Subsequent Alnylam filings describe Ribopharma (renamed Alnylam Europe AG) as a wholly owned subsidiary. While some secondary sources call the deal a merger, the strongest official evidence supports classifying it as an acquisition.
